summary: Replayed ADR 0267 from the exact `0.177.104` mainline baseline, preserved the governed validation-gate waiver surfaces on the live host and Windmill worker checkout, repaired the latest-main Docker runtime nftables forward-compat insertion regression surfaced during the replay, and records the canonical mainline proof that advances the tracked platform baseline from `0.130.69` to `0.130.70` on repository release `0.177.105`.

verification.observed: The exact-main retry slice passed with `100 passed in 5.59s` across the governed waiver, repo-surface merge, Windmill validation-gate, Docker runtime nftables repair, Docker publication helper, OpenBao helper, and post-verify regression paths, and `make syntax-check-windmill` also passed on the refreshed `0.177.104` tree.

The release dry run confirmed current version `0.177.104`, next version `0.177.105`, and one unreleased note for ADR 0267; the write run then prepared repository release `0.177.105` and regenerated the protected release surfaces on the integrated main candidate.

`make converge-windmill` succeeded from the exact-main workspace that is now committed as `e4ce03ba3375d1ba3d41b65c65e44ea5fe2235be`, with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=295 changed=46 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=61`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=68 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=20`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16`.

verification.check: Governed waiver summary and current host/runtime state
verification.observed: `make gate-status` reported `Waiver summary: 0 open, 63 legacy, 0 warnings, 0 release blockers`, while fresh host and runtime probes reconfirmed hostname `Debian-trixie-latest-amd64-base`, kernel `6.17.13-2-pve`, active `pveproxy` and `tailscaled`, listeners on `2222`, `8005`, and `8006`, `sudo qm status 120 => status: running`, and Windmill answering `CE v1.662.0`.

The merged tree passed `release_manager.py status`, `canonical_truth.py --check`, `platform_manifest.py --check`, `live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `git diff --check`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards data-models generated-docs`. Both `make remote-validate` and `make pre-push-gate` were also exercised end to end; each wrapper reported only two blockers, the expected terminal-branch `workstream-surfaces` guard for branch `codex/ws-0267-mainline-final` and one unrelated existing `mypy` runner defect in `platform/repo.py` caused by missing `PyYAML` stubs.

notes: This receipt supersedes the branch-local receipt as the canonical mainline proof for ADR 0267 on release `0.177.105`.
The earlier branch-local receipt remains preserved as the audit trail for the first exact-main replay and the discovery of the latest-main nftables forward-compat defect.
The merged-tree validation sweep is now recorded in the accompanying `2026-03-30-ws-0267-mainline-*0.177.105.txt` evidence files.

The wrapper-gate evidence also records one unrelated baseline defect outside ADR 0267 scope: the `type-check` runner still reports `platform/repo.py:231` because the check-runner image lacks `PyYAML` stubs.
